---
description: "Use when planning, decomposing work, breaking down tasks, creating implementation plans, or operating in Plan mode. Governs how large plans are structured and delivered."
---

## Planning Session Guidelines

When producing a plan whose implementation could overwhelm a single context window:

- **Split into separate planning prompts** — deliver each as a self-contained markdown block inside a code fence, ready to copy-paste into its own planning/implementation session.
- **No code in planning prompts** — only intent, scope, acceptance criteria, and relevant file/component references.
- Each prompt must carry enough context to stand alone (no "see above" references).
- Order prompts by dependency (independent work first, dependent work last).
